properties.name: bluetape4k.leader.aop.enabled
properties.description: Leader AOP 자동 구성 전체 활성화 여부.

properties.name: bluetape4k.leader.aop.strict
properties.description: Footgun 검출 strict 모드. true=startup fail, false=WARN.

properties.name: bluetape4k.leader.aop.failure-mode
properties.description: 전역 default failure mode (어노테이션 미지정 시).

properties.name: bluetape4k.leader.aop.lock-name-prefix
properties.description: SpEL 평가 결과 앞에 자동 부착되는 prefix. empty string opt-out.

properties.name: bluetape4k.leader.aop.spel.allow-method-invocation
properties.description: SpEL withMethodResolvers 활성화. CVE-2022-22947 회색지대 차단을 위해 default false.
